h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue practicing the same field:value pattern with each new column as prompted by the tutor.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure for reversal; the tutor simply repeats the same template without any breakdown or adaptive mechanism change.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no later tutor turn can adapt to a revised framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no later tutor turn can adapt to a revised framing.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for reversal; the tutor simply repeats the same template without any breakdown or adaptive mechanism change.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for reversal; the tutor simply repeats the same template without any breakdown or adaptive mechanism change.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: The checklist feels tight, but it keeps me from jumping to “went up” yet.
